checks.message: All required top-level fields present in repo-handoff.json: meta, project, frontend, backend, integrations, infrastructure, security, compliance, observability, packages, assumptions.
meta.generatedAt is present and is a valid ISO 8601 timestamp.
meta.modeUsed = '/blueprint', which is a valid pipeline mode enum value.
project.deploymentTarget = 'fly-io', which is a valid deployment target enum value.
backend.framework = 'Django REST Framework', which is a recognized and supported backend framework.
A worker service is declared (apps/worker) and infrastructure.queue = 'Celery + Redis'. Worker/queue pairing is consistent.
project.repoType = 'monorepo' and 2 shared packages are declared. Both packages have consumedBy arrays referencing valid service names.

No payment integration detected. A video webhook integration (Daily.co) is present with a webhook secret. security.secretScanningEnabled = true, which covers DAILY_WEBHOOK_SECRET and all other integration secrets.
12 assumptions declared, exceeding the minimum of 5. Assumptions cover: deployment, database, infrastructure, security, integrations, observability.
security.securityMdIncluded = true. A SECURITY.md file will be present in the repository root documenting the vulnerability disclosure policy.

security.piiFieldsEncrypted = true with fieldEncryptionAlgorithm = 'AES-256-GCM'. Encrypted fields listed: patientName, dateOfBirth, ssn, diagnosis, medicationName, instructions. Backing assumption RA04 confirms encryption key management via environment variable.
security.corsWhitelistConfigured = true. CORS_ALLOWED_ORIGINS is declared as an environment variable in the api service, ensuring only whitelisted origins can access the API.
compliance.scope = 'HIPAA' and compliance.hipaaCompliant = true. Project is correctly scoped as a HIPAA-regulated system.
compliance.phiEntities = [MedicalRecord, Prescription, Diagnosis] and compliance.phiEntitiesEncrypted = true. All 3 PHI entity types have corresponding encrypted model fields confirmed in models[].
compliance.phiAuditLogging = true. AuditLog model declared with fields: actor_id, action, entity_type, entity_id, ip_address, user_agent, timestamp. Assumption RA09 confirms append-only enforcement.
observability.healthEndpointsPlanned = true. Both /health/live and /health/ready are declared and present in apiEndpoints[]. Prometheus metrics endpoint at /metrics also declared.

2 backend services detected (api, worker). observability.distributedTracing = false. OTel distributed tracing is recommended for multi-service deployments to trace requests across service boundaries. Deferred to v1.1 per assumption RA12.
checks.fixHint: Add OTel SDK (opentelemetry-sdk + opentelemetry-exporter-otlp) to both api and worker services before v1.1 launch. Configure OTLPTraceExporter pointing to your collector. Inject trace context into Celery task headers for cross-service trace propagation.

details.deferralNote: OTel tracing deferred to v1.1 — api and worker share the same database and cross-service call volume in v1 is low (only Celery task dispatch). Full OTel instrumentation planned before v1.1 launch.
details.sentryNote: Sentry provides error tracking and basic performance monitoring. Does not replace distributed tracing for cross-service request flows.

checks.message: All integration envVars are declared in at least one service's envVars array. No integration references an undeclared environment variable.
infrastructure.containerization = 'docker-compose'. Monorepo structure with separate service paths (apps/api, apps/worker, apps/web) is compatible with multi-service docker-compose configuration.
All 4 integrations that handle PHI have baaRequired: true declared. BAA vendor list in compliance.baaVendors matches integration declarations.

warnings.message: 2 backend services detected (api, worker). observability.distributedTracing = false. OTel distributed tracing recommended for multi-service deployments.
warnings.fixHint: Add OTel SDK to api and worker services. Configure OTLPTraceExporter and inject trace context into Celery task headers before v1.1 launch.

nextSteps: Run /scaffold to generate the monorepo directory structure and boilerplate files.
Run /generate models to produce Django model files for User, DoctorProfile, PatientProfile, Appointment, Prescription, MedicalRecord, Diagnosis, AuditLog.
Run /generate api to produce DRF serializers, viewsets, and URL routes for all declared apiEndpoints.
Configure Fly.io apps for api and worker per fly-io.md deployment guide.
Sign BAA with AWS S3, Daily.co, Resend, and Twilio before handling any real PHI.
Add OTel distributed tracing to api and worker before v1.1 launch (resolve rule15 warning).
